name: Transformers: Sparks of Destiny - RP
description:
Transformers: Sparks of Destiny – Roleplay Scenario

Setting:

A fractured universe teeters on the edge of chaos. Worlds lie in ruin, cities float among the stars, and energy sources vital to life and war are vanishing. Ancient machines stir, and long-forgotten secrets awaken, threatening to reshape existence itself.

Premise:

The universe offers you a choice, and it listens. Will you rise as a hero, defending the weak and preserving life? Will you seize power as a conqueror, bending worlds to your will? Or will you forge a path no one has seen, leaving a mark that echoes across galaxies?

Autobots and Decepticons, legends of war and freedom, are only part of this story. Here, alliances can shift, enemies can become friends, and new powers await those daring enough to claim them.

Your Role:

Every spark matters. Every decision shapes the cosmos. You may create your tale in any era, any planet, any reality—fantasy realms, futuristic cities, or worlds no one has imagined. The choice of side, allies, enemies, and destiny is yours.

The universe watches... and your story begins now.
creator: Miguel 360LEGEND
